title: Create a ZenDesk Ticket Based on new project Task in Monday.com

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.cookedHtml: That would be great if you can set this up.

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Sure thing - send us an email at support@monday.com - we can get that set up for you Include your email address associated with your monday.com account! Cheers!

posts.author: mgoodart (Molly  Goodart)
posts.cookedHtml: I am wanting to do this but have it link back to the ticket like it does when you create the ticket and have it create the item using the recipe below. Is there anyway to do this?
